evaluators.name: Thesis Sources Reading List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a 'Thesis Sources' reading list contains exactly the 3 most-cited qualifying RL journal articles (2019–2023, ≥50 citations).

evaluators.name: Latest GNN Conference Paper Citation Note Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the most recent graph neural network conference paper’s APA citation is saved in a note, with correct title and linkage.

evaluators.name: Higher-Funded Climate Modeling Project Bookmark Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that, among the first two 'climate modeling' search results, the higher-funded project with ≥4 team members is bookmarked in 'Potential collaborations'.

evaluators.name: Courses to Take 2025 List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that 'Courses to Take 2025' is a course list with exactly the two lowest-numbered qualifying Spring 2025 graduate courses (≥3 credits).

evaluators.name: Attend List Earliest Event and Reminder Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the earliest upcoming qualifying event (public, next 6 months, New York or Online) is in an 'Attend' list with a 3-day reminder.

evaluators.name: Supervision Contact Request and Slot Selection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that Alex Rivera submitted a prospective PhD request mentioning machine learning and chose the earliest valid Wednesday 10:00–12:00 slot.

evaluators.name: Profile Tagline and Primary Keywords Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the profile tagline describes using ML to speed up scientific discovery and that exactly the three specified primary keywords are set.

evaluators.name: Publications Display and Featured Paper Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the profile shows 5 publications sorted by citations and that exactly one post-2021 publication is featured.
